program_en: B.Sc. in Human Movement Science and Health Studies
program_chi: 人體運動科學與健康研究理學士
learning_outcomes:
HMSHN_Learning Outcomes_ENG 1.  |  Major Programme:
Graduates of the B.Sc. Programme in Human
Movement Science and Health Studies (HMSH) will be able to:
(1)  |  demonstrate specialist knowledge and professional skills
in Human Movement Science and Health Studies (K/S);
(2)  |  plan and implement a
programme of investigative work (K/S);
(3)  |  demonstrate an
informed, critical, and innovative approach to learning (K/S/V);
(4)  |  synthesize and evaluate
strategies to enhance professionalism (K/S/V);
(5)  |  gather and use information as a strategic resource to
contribute creatively to the development of Human Movement Science and Health
Studies (S);
(6)  |  display a critical and creative
attitude in their professional life (V); and
(7)  |  apply their knowledge
and skills in sports science and health practices (K/S).
K = Knowledge outcomes S = Skills
outcomes V = Values and attitude outcomes
study_scheme:
Physical Education, Exercise Science and Health Human Movement Science and Health Studies Applicable to students admitted in 2025-26
Major Programme Requirement
Students are required to complete a
minimum of 59 units of courses as follows:
